eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 03:33 PM ON FEB 14, 2026 Effective until 11:33 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Maricopa County. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. The Phoenix Police is looking for 30 year old Alstolfo Marquez Iturralde  last seen on foot wearing a black hoodie with GAP in white lettering, light blue jeans, and black adidas shoes . If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
